description_long: This is a modern residential house complex featuring two main buildings connected by a paved road, surrounded by a regular arrangement of trees. The houses have flat roofs, large windows, and open layouts, with visible outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool and multiple patios. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with extensive use of glass and concrete, giving a sleek and contemporary appearance. The landscaping is minimalistic, with evenly spaced trees lining the road and property boundaries. Vehicles are present on the road, indicating accessibility and integration with urban infrastructure. The overall design emphasizes openness, clean lines, and a harmonious blend with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house complex with large windows, light exteriors, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a pool and patios.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house complex from above, highlighting the main building, pool, patios, and the tree-lined road connecting the two structures.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a street-level perspective, emphasizing the separation between the two main buildings and the symmetrical arrangement of trees along the road.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the main house, showcasing the pool area, patios, and the secondary building in the background.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a frontal view of both buildings, clearly showing the road, tree alignment, and the modern architectural style.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with large glass doors, no visible porch, and a clean, open approach from the road
